attacks.name: Delta Draw
attacks.text: Count the number of Pokémon you have in play that has δ on its card. Draw up to that many cards.

attacks.name: Present
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for any 1 card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If tails, your opponent may search his or her deck for any 1 card and put it into his or her hand. Your opponent shuffles his or her deck afterward.
